# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    protected $allowedDomains = [
        'example.com',
        'anotherdomain.com',
    ];

    public function fetchPreview(Request $request)
    {
        $url = $request->input('url');

        if (!$this->isAllowedDomain($url)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Domain not allowed'], 403);
        }

        if ($this->isInternalIp($url)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Internal IP addresses are blocked'], 403);
        }

        $content = $this->getPageContent($url);

        return response()->json(['content' => $content]);
    }

    protected function isAllowedDomain($url)
    {
        $host = parse_url($url, PHP_URL_HOST);
        return in_array($host, $this->allowedDomains);
    }

    protected function isInternalIp($url)
    {
        $ip = gethostbyname(parse_url($url, PHP_URL_HOST));
        return filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false;
    }

    protected function getPageContent($url)
    {
        $ch = curl_init($url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, false);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS, 3);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 10);
        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        curl_close($ch);
        
        return $response;
    }
}
